description: NLC/TUC strikes and major labour actions 2011–2026.

sources_used.name: Wikipedia — Bola Tinubu (2023 NLC response to subsidy removal)

data.cause: Fuel subsidy removal by Jonathan administration — pump price doubled
data.outcome: Jonathan partially reversed price — reduced from NGN141 to NGN97/litre. Strike suspended.
data.political_significance: Occupy Nigeria movement — one of Nigeria's largest mass protests. Severely damaged Jonathan's image before 2015 election.

sources.name: Wikipedia — Petroleum industry in Nigeria (partial reference)

data.outcome: Negotiations led to suspension of strike action; palliatives (cash transfers) announced
data.political_significance: Tinubu's most contentious early policy. NLC called for NGN494,000/month minimum wage.

gaps.note: Multiple NLC actions in this period not documented here. Source: NLC press releases or Premium Times labor archives.
NLC actions after 2023 subsidy strike not documented. Critical for 2027 electoral context.
